errors.conflict: Conflict with the current state of the resource.
errors.forbidden: You do not have permission to perform this action.
errors.rate_limited: Too many requests. Please try again later.
errors.internal: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again later.
errors.google_not_configured: Google login is not configured on the server.
errors.google_unreachable: Could not reach Google. Please try again later.
errors.google_code_invalid: The Google authorization code is invalid or has expired.
errors.invalid_state: The login state is invalid or has expired. Please start again.
errors.token_revoked: The authentication token has been revoked. Please sign in again.
errors.role_exists: A role with this name already exists.
errors.account_disabled: Your account has been disabled. Please contact an administrator.
errors.cannot_disable_self: You cannot disable your own account.
errors.department_code_exists: A department with this code already exists.
errors.head_doctor_not_found: The selected head doctor was not found.
errors.head_doctor_not_doctor: The selected user must have the doctor role.
errors.symptom_code_exists: A symptom with this code already exists.

messages.onboarded: Welcome! Your account has been created.
